name: Salad Bar Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Cut-up fresh vegetables (broccoli buds, cauliflower florets, red and yellow bell pepper rings, sliced red onion, julienne carrots)
1 tbsp Fresh basil leaves (or 1 teaspoon dried)
1 tbsp Fresh oregano leaves (or 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Have crusts ready to fill.
3. Combine vegetables with olive oil, water, and garlic in a nonstick skillet over medium-low heat.
4. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until water evaporates (about 5 minutes).
5. Spoon tomato sauce over crusts.
6. Arrange vegetables evenly over the sauce.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
8. Sprinkle with fresh basil leaves and oregano leaves or their dried equivalents.
9. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake on the bottom shelf of the oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
11. Makes two 9-inch deep-dish pizzas.
12. Nutrients (per quarter of a pizza): Calories 277, Protein 14.2 grams, Fat 6.5 grams, Cholesterol 15.0 mg, Fiber 4.1 grams, Sodium 1130 mg.
